children.name: I build digital experiences where design meets code - interactive, intentional, and human-first. I collaborate with brands that have a story to tell, turning ideas into fluid, responsive experiences.
children.characters: I build digital experiences where design meets code - interactive, intentional, and human-first. I collaborate with brands that have a story to tell, turning ideas into fluid, responsive experiences.

children.name: Interfaces that feel as good as they look
children.characters: Interfaces that feel as good as they look

children.name: When I'm not coding, I'm probably sketching, collecting vinyl, or chasing good light.

children.name: From landing pages to full web applications - built with clean code, smooth animations, and pixel-perfect attention to detail.

children.name: I bring interfaces to life with purposeful, fluid motion that enhances the user experience.

children.name: I treat every project like it's my own. Clear communication, no surprises.

children.name: The brief was simple: make it feel alive. Luminary Studio needed a digital presence that matched the energy of their work — bold, confident, and impossible to ignore.
children.characters: The brief was simple: make it feel alive. Luminary Studio needed a digital presence  that matched the energy of their work —  bold, confident, and impossible to ignore.

children.name: We stripped everything back. No clutter, no noise — just type, motion, and white space doing the heavy lifting. Every scroll triggers something. Every hover has intent.
children.characters: We stripped everything back. No clutter,  no noise — just type, motion, and white  space doing the heavy lifting. Every scroll  triggers something. Every hover has intent.

children.name: I build immersive experiences for brands with direction and momentum. I am Alex Chen.
children.characters:
I build immersive experiences for brands with direction and momentum.
I am Alex Chen.

children.name: A creative developer with 5 years of experience building high-performance websites and digital products. I work at the intersection of design and code, where aesthetics meet functionality.
children.characters: A creative developer  with 5 years of experience building  high-performance websites and digital  products. I work at the intersection  of design and code, where aesthetics  meet functionality.

children.name: My focus is on motion, interaction, and the details that make a product feel alive.

children.name: "Alex didn't just build a website - he built our brand's voice. Clean, intentional, and a pleasure to work with."
children.characters: "Alex didn't just build a website - he built our brand's voice. Clean, intentional, and a pleasure to work with."

children.name: "Finally a designer who understands both aesthetics and strategy. Our conversion rate doubled after the redesign."
children.characters: "Finally a designer who understands both aesthetics and strategy. Our conversion rate doubled after the redesign."

children.name: "Alex's attention to motion and micro-interactions made our plant shop feel alive online. Customers keep mentioning the experience."
